distilleries.name: Bodega Scala Dei Marc de Garnacha
distilleries.address: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei, Tarragona, Spain
distilleries.distillation_method: Traditional copper-still distillation of Garnacha and Carinena pomace from the DOQ Priorat harvest
distilleries.tasting_program: Marc available for purchase at the Scala Dei shop during winery visiting hours
distilleries.description: Scala Dei produces a traditional marc from its DOQ Priorat pomace; sold alongside the main Garnacha range at the winery shop adjacent to the Cartoixa ruins.

verified.address_quoted: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei

distilleries.name: Cooperativa Falset Marca Marc Etim
distilleries.address: Avinguda de la Catalunya 2, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
distilleries.classification: Marc de vi (DO Montsant grape pomace)
distilleries.distillation_method: Cooperative pomace distillation from Garnacha pressings after the DO Montsant vintage; limited seasonal release
distilleries.tasting_program: Marc Etim available for purchase at the cooperative shop during opening hours
distilleries.description: The Falset cooperative produces a small batch of marc from its Garnacha pressings; sold at the cooperative shop inside the Martinell building.

distilleries.name: Mas Martinet Marc de Garnacha
distilleries.address: Carretera Falset-Gratallops km 5, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
distilleries.distillation_method: Estate Garnacha pomace from DOQ Priorat harvest distilled in small copper alembic; not widely distributed, sold at the estate
distilleries.tasting_program: Available for tasting during estate visits by appointment; very limited production
distilleries.description: Mas Martinet produces a very small-batch marc from its DOQ Priorat Garnacha pressings; available only at the estate during scheduled visits.

distilleries.name: Clos Mogador Marc de Priorat
distilleries.address: Camino Manyetes s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
distilleries.distillation_method: Estate Garnacha and Carinena pomace distilled on a small copper alembic at the Manyetes cellar; tiny production, estate-only
distilleries.tasting_program: Offered only during private estate visits by appointment; extremely limited stock
distilleries.description: Clos Mogador produces a tiny-batch marc from its Manyetes Garnacha pressings; the most limited and site-specific spirit in the Priorat zone.

distilleries.name: Celler El Masroig Marc de Garnacha
distilleries.address: Carrer Sant Antoni 11, 43736 El Masroig, Tarragona, Spain
distilleries.classification: Marc de vi (DO Montsant grape pomace)
distilleries.distillation_method: Pomace distillation from Garnacha and Carinena pressings after DO Montsant vintage; aged briefly in used oak
distilleries.tasting_program: Marc available for purchase alongside wines at the cooperative shop; no dedicated distillery tour
distilleries.description: El Masroig cooperative distills a small marc from its Garnacha and Carinena pomace; available at the cooperative shop alongside Les Sorts Montsant wines.

distilleries.name: Costers del Siurana Marc de l'Obac
distilleries.address: Camino de la Bassa s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
distilleries.distillation_method: Garnacha, Cabernet Sauvignon and Carinena pomace distilled after the DOQ Priorat harvest; small estate copper still
distilleries.tasting_program: Available for purchase during estate visits by appointment
distilleries.description: Costers del Siurana makes a small-batch marc from the Clos de l'Obac pomace; available at the Gratallops estate during appointment visits.

verified.address_quoted: Camino de la Bassa s/n, Gratallops

distilleries.name: Torres Marc del Penedes
distilleries.address: Finca el Maset s/n, 08796 Pacs del Penedes, Barcelona, Spain
distilleries.distillation_method: Copper Charentais pot stills for brandy; grape-pomace copper still for marc; aged in American oak
distilleries.tasting_program: Torres visitor centre offers full brandy and marc tasting flights; advance booking recommended
distilleries.description: Torres's Penedes distillery operation producing Catalan marc alongside the Torres brandy range; reachable as a day trip from Priorat on the wine route.

verified.address_quoted: Finca el Maset s/n, Pacs del Penedes

distilleries.name: Mas Doix Marc de Carinena
distilleries.distillation_method: Old-vine Carinena pomace distilled in small copper alembic after the DOQ harvest; estate-only, extremely limited
distilleries.tasting_program: Available only at the estate during appointment visits
distilleries.description: Mas Doix's marc from its century-old Carinena vines in Poboleda; the most terroir-specific Priorat spirit, poured during estate appointment visits.

distilleries.name: Celler Val Llach Marc de Carinena
distilleries.address: Carrer de la Font 38, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
distilleries.distillation_method: Old-vine Carinena and Garnacha pomace from Porrera-zone parcels distilled in small copper alembic
distilleries.tasting_program: Available during estate visits by appointment in Porrera
distilleries.description: Val Llach's marc from Porrera-zone old-vine Carinena; a small-batch spirit available at the estate alongside the Val Llach wine range.

distilleries.name: Clos Galena Marc de Garnacha
distilleries.address: Carretera de Gratallops s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
distilleries.distillation_method: Garnacha pomace from llicorella terraces distilled in copper alembic; small seasonal release
distilleries.tasting_program: Available at the estate during appointment visits; part of the Clos Galena visit programme
distilleries.description: Clos Galena's marc from Garnacha pressings on the Gratallops llicorella terraces; available during appointment visits as part of the estate experience.
